focus.label: Europe + MENA
focus.description: Europe, Middle East, Levant, North Africa, and Sudan

middle_east.label: Middle East
middle_east.description: GTD Middle East & North Africa region excluding North African countries

levant.label: Levant
levant.description: Israel, Jordan, Lebanon, Syria, and West Bank and Gaza Strip

north_africa.label: North Africa
north_africa.description: Algeria, Egypt, Libya, Morocco, Sudan, Tunisia, and Western Sahara

europe.label: Europe
europe.description: GTD Eastern Europe and Western Europe regions

grid.positionNote: Incident coordinates are aggregated to 0.25° cell centers; circles do not show exact locations.

source.name: Global Terrorism Database
source.citation: START (National Consortium for the Study of Terrorism and Responses to Terrorism). (2022). Global Terrorism Database, 1970-2020 [data file].
source.usage: Non-commercial analysis and visualization; raw GTD data are not included in this site.

methodology.mapPopulation: Incidents with non-null latitude and longitude
methodology.fatalities: Sum of confirmed fatalities only; blank values remain unknown, not zero.
methodology.coverage: 2021 includes January through June only. Collection methodology changed over time.
